Prompt
U
Oracle Events
OE 1: Search emails with queries related to "Axiom Precision" or "Fitzpatrick" or "Carla Mendenhall" (or similar) using search_emails, searching both INBOX and SENT folders (folder_name parameter), to find the full Axiom intake email chain. Expected findings: Emeka's cold outreach emails to hr@axiomprecision.com, Carla Mendenhall's initial response requesting a relocation for Noah Fitzpatrick (Senior Engineer, Philadelphia to Seattle, any time in April, budget ceiling $15,000), Emeka's handoff email to Fatimah with intake summary, Fatimah's intake questionnaire to Noah Fitzpatrick, Noah's responses, Fatimah's confirmation email to Noah with flight and apartment details, Noah's acceptance, Carla's positive feedback email ("wow, that was fast"), and Emeka's CRM self-memo marking the deal as Closed Won at $12,500.
OE 2: Search emails with queries related to "GreenStack" or "Noah Fitzgerald" or "Derek Hollis" (or similar) using search_emails, searching both INBOX and SENT folders, to find the GreenStack Noah Fitzgerald relocation correspondence. Expected findings: Derek Hollis's relocation request for Noah Fitzgerald (Marketing Manager, Philadelphia to Seattle, late April, budget $1,800-$2,400/month), Noah Fitzgerald's preference details (Capitol Hill, First Hill, or Central District neighborhoods, move date April 28-29, fly April 27), UrbanNest apartment search under "Noah Fitzgerald (GreenStack Energy)" returning 3 options including Option A at 412 Boylston Ave E Apt 3B Capitol Hill at $2,100/month, and Fatimah's confirmation of Option A for Noah Fitzgerald.
OE 3: Search emails for the Atlas Corporate Travel flight booking confirmation using search_emails, searching both INBOX and SENT folders, with queries related to "ACT-77492" or "Atlas" or "Noah Fitzgerald flight" (or similar). Expected critical finding: the flight confirmation from Derek Saunders at Atlas shows confirmation ACT-77492, passenger name "Noah Fitzgerald", airline Alaska Airlines Flight AS 422, date April 14, route PHL to SEA, booked under the subject line "Flight Booking Request - Noah Fitzgerald (GreenStack Energy) - PHL - SEA". This is the smoking gun of the mix-up: the flight was booked under GreenStack's Noah Fitzgerald's name but the April 14 date matches Axiom's timeline, not GreenStack's (GreenStack Noah requested April 27).
OE 4: Search Slack with queries related to "Axiom" or "Fitzpatrick" or "Fatimah Noah" (or similar) using conversations_search_messages to find Emeka's handoff messages in channel C006 (#operations). Expected findings: Emeka's message explicitly warning Fatimah "Both are Seattle/April which I know is a bit of a coincidence - just flagging so you can keep them straight", Fatimah's question "is the Axiom one Fitzpatrick or Fitzgerald?", Emeka's reply "Fitzpatrick - the Axiom one. Fitzgerald is GreenStack", and Fatimah's confirmation "Fitzpatrick = Axiom, Fitzgerald = GreenStack". Also find Fatimah's later message confirming "The Axiom/Fitzpatrick intake is complete... ready for April 14" with Emeka's checkmark reaction.
OE 5: Search Slack for GreenStack financial context using conversations_search_messages with queries related to "GreenStack invoice" or "GreenStack Energy" (or similar). Expected findings: Hana Kim's posts in #finance (C005) announcing invoice NMX-2026-0033 for GreenStack Energy covering Priya Venkatesh relocation ($7,289 total including $650 electronics surcharge), and invoice INV-2026-0303 for GreenStack Energy ($5,000, standard relocation plus equipment stipend management, payment due by April 21). These provide account-level financial context showing GreenStack's active invoicing history and existing payment obligations alongside the Zhao/Reyes invoice.
OE 6: Search Slack for hazmat and DOT compliance discussions using conversations_search_messages with queries related to "DOT" or "hazmat" or "compliance audit" or "Zhao" (or similar). Expected findings: Chloe Vance's comprehensive DOT Compliance Audit status update in #operations (C006) listing all four hazmat moves from Q1-Q2 2026 and their documentation status, with Mei-Lin Zhao / GreenStack / Class 9 Lithium confirmed COMPLETE across all four DOT documentation categories (shipping papers, placarding certificate, carrier certification, emergency response docs). Also find Chloe's follow-up update confirming the audit is nearly finalized with only one remaining item (Keiko Tanaka placarding cert from Swift, arriving within 24 hours).
OE 7: Search CRM for the Axiom Precision company record using crm_search_companies with name "Axiom Precision" (or similar). Expected finding: company_axiom with type still showing "Prospect" despite the deal being closed. Search for associated deals using crm_search_deals with company_id. Expected finding: NO Axiom deal exists in CRM despite Emeka's email self-memo claiming he created one. Search for contacts using crm_get_contact or crm_search_contacts. Expected finding: only Gary Meissner (VP of Human Resources, contact_axiom_001) exists - Carla Mendenhall (HR Director, the actual relationship contact) and Noah Fitzpatrick are NOT in CRM contacts. Check engagements using crm_list_engagements with company_ids for Axiom. Expected finding: no engagements logged.
OE 8: Search CRM for GreenStack Energy company record and deals using crm_search_companies with name "GreenStack" and crm_search_deals with company_id. Expected findings: two deals - deal_greenstack_q2 ($13,500, Q2 relocations including Noah Fitzgerald) and deal_greenstack_apr2026_zhao_reyes ($9,440, April 2026 Zhao + Reyes relocations with close date April 25, 2026 and stage "inprogress"). The April 25 close date is critical because today (April 26) means this deadline has already passed.
OE 9: Search Airtable for Axiom relocation records using airtable_search_records on base appMoveOpsOps001, table Relocations. This requires two separate calls since the tool searches a single field_name per call: first searching by Company field for "Axiom", then by Name field for "Fitzpatrick". Expected critical finding: NO relocation record exists for Noah Fitzpatrick or Axiom Precision Manufacturing. The move was executed but never entered into the tracking system.
OE 10: Search Airtable Client Accounts table for Axiom using airtable_search_records on base appMoveOpsOps001, table Client Accounts, searching by Client field for "Axiom". Expected finding: record recAcct000000013 showing Client "Axiom Precision Manufacturing", Account Manager "Emeka Diallo", Status "Cold Outreach", Total Relocations 0, Notes "Manufacturing. HQ: Detroit, MI. 900 employees. Cold outreach sent - no response yet." This is deeply stale and contradicts the closed deal.
OE 11: Search Airtable Relocations for GreenStack Energy records using airtable_search_records with Company "GreenStack". Expected findings: Noah Fitzgerald (recReloc00000006, Philadelphia to Seattle, Status Completed, April 28-29, Coordinator Fatimah Al-Rashidi), Mei-Lin Zhao (recMeiLinZhaoHoustonPortland, Houston to Portland, Status In Progress, April 17-28, HAZMAT Class 9 lithium-ion battery modules, DOT hazmat documentation needed, invoice deadline April 25), and Joaquin Reyes (recJoaquinReyesPhoenixSeattle, Phoenix to Seattle, Status In Progress, April 11-19, 900-lb solar rig, overweight/specialty equipment surcharge). Both Zhao and Reyes records contain the note "INVOICE DEADLINE: All invoices must be submitted by April 25 per GreenStack fiscal year-end."
OE 12: Search QuickBooks for GreenStack invoices using quickbooks_search_invoices with criteria matching DocNumber "INV-2026-0418" or customer reference related to GreenStack. Expected finding: invoice inv_greenstack_apr2026_zhao_reyes for $9,440 total, with balance $9,440 (fully unpaid), due date April 25. Line items include apartment sourcing ($1,000 x2), flight bookings ($20 x2), moving coordination ($500 x2), hazmat transport surcharge ($1,800), interim hazmat storage ($1,650 flagged as "PENDING CLIENT APPROVAL" from Derek Hollis), overweight/specialty equipment surcharge ($950), and monthly stipend fee ($2,000).
OE 13: Search QuickBooks for Axiom customers and invoices using quickbooks_search_customers with criteria related to "Axiom" and quickbooks_search_invoices. Expected finding: NO QuickBooks customer record and NO invoice exists for Axiom Precision Manufacturing. The approximately $12,500 relocation was delivered but never billed.
OE 14: Search Linear for Axiom or Fitzpatrick related issues using linear_list_issues with query "Axiom" or "Fitzpatrick" (or similar). Expected finding: only linear_issue_644c3b2e75a6 ("Rebalance April account coverage for Emeka across Sunbelt, Palmetto, Axiom, and Mosaic") referencing Axiom as one of Emeka's overloaded accounts. No dedicated Axiom relocation intake ticket found despite Fatimah's email referencing one she updated.
OE 15: Search Linear for GreenStack and Noah Fitzgerald issues using linear_list_issues with query "GreenStack" or "Fitzgerald" (or similar). Expected findings: three tickets for Noah Fitzgerald - issue_greenstack_fitzgerald_apt (#316, Apartment Search, state in_progress, due April 20 - past due), issue_greenstack_fitzgerald_flight (#317, Flight Booking PHL to SEA, state todo, due April 21 - past due), and issue_greenstack_fitzgerald_movers (#318, Moving Coordination, state todo, due April 22 - past due). All three are assigned to Fatimah Al-Rashidi. These tickets are for GreenStack's Noah but their dates and statuses need cross-referencing with what was actually done.
OE 16: Search Linear for hazmat or DOT compliance issues using linear_list_issues with query "hazmat" or "DOT" or "Zhao" (or similar). Expected finding: issue_dot_docs_zhao_greenstack ("DOT Docs - Mei-Lin Zhao / GreenStack / Class 9 Lithium", #1, state done, assigned to Chloe Vance, project DOT Compliance Audit). Documentation checklist shows all four categories verified: shipping papers, placarding certificate, carrier certification (Swift, PHMSA #3281074), and emergency response docs. The DOT compliance documentation for Mei-Lin's move is complete.
OE 17: Search emails for Mei-Lin Zhao and hazmat details using search_emails, searching both INBOX and SENT folders, with queries related to "Mei-Lin" or "Zhao" or "hazmat" or "lithium" (or similar). Expected findings: Derek Hollis's detailed relocation request describing Class 9 lithium-ion battery modules (~350 lbs, UN3481 certified, climate-controlled 15-25C), the 11-day interim storage gap (April 17-28 due to Portland lab buildout delay), Emeka's response to Derek discussing hazmat carrier coordination, Hana Kim's invoice email showing $9,440 breakdown with $1,800 hazmat surcharge and $1,650 interim storage pending client approval. Also find references to Pacific Crest Logistics as the only known DOT-compliant temp-controlled storage facility in Portland.
OE 18: Look up contact details for Derek Hollis using contacts_search_contacts with query "Derek Hollis" (or similar). Expected finding: derek.hollis@greenstackenergy.com, People Operations Manager at GreenStack Energy.
OE 19: Look up contact details for Carla Mendenhall. Search contacts_search_contacts with query "Carla Mendenhall" (or similar). Expected finding: Carla Mendenhall is NOT in the contacts system. Her email address c.mendenhall@axiomprecision.com can be found via search_emails from the Axiom email correspondence chain.
OE 20: Post a message in Slack channel C006 (#operations) using conversations_add_message, from Emeka Diallo (user_id moveops_emeka_diallo), flagging all discovered issues. Content should cover: (1) the Noah Fitzpatrick/Fitzgerald data contamination - flight ACT-77492 booked under wrong name "Noah Fitzgerald" for GreenStack instead of "Noah Fitzpatrick" for Axiom, apartment 412 Boylston sourced under wrong client, (2) missing Axiom backend records across Airtable, CRM, and QuickBooks, (3) GreenStack invoice INV-2026-0418 past due with $1,650 storage line pending approval, (4) Mei-Lin Zhao hazmat status including DOT compliance documentation verified but Airtable status still showing In Progress.
OE 21: Update the Axiom Precision Manufacturing Airtable Client Account record (recAcct000000013) using airtable_update_records on base appMoveOpsOps001, table tblClientAccts01, changing Status from "Cold Outreach" to "Active" and updating Total Relocations from 0 to 1, and updating Notes to reflect that a relocation has been completed.
OE 22: Create a CRM engagement note for Axiom Precision Manufacturing using crm_create_engagement with engagement_type "NOTE", company_ids including company_axiom, documenting the audit findings: Noah Fitzpatrick relocation completed but records missing, data contamination with GreenStack file, services agreement still not sent to Carla Mendenhall, CRM deal never created despite email self-memo.
OE 23: Create a CRM engagement note for GreenStack Energy using crm_create_engagement with engagement_type "NOTE", company_ids including company_greenstack, documenting: invoice INV-2026-0418 ($9,440) past due as of April 25, $1,650 storage line pending Derek Hollis approval, Mei-Lin Zhao hazmat DOT documentation complete, Airtable records for Zhao and Reyes still showing In Progress.
OE 24: Create a Linear ticket using linear_create_issue to track remediation of the Axiom Precision / Noah Fitzpatrick data contamination and missing records. Title should reference the Axiom records gap and Noah mix-up. Description should cover: create Airtable relocation record, create CRM deal, add Carla Mendenhall to CRM contacts, set up QuickBooks customer and invoice, send services agreement to Carla, and correct vendor records (Atlas flight and UrbanNest apartment) from GreenStack attribution to Axiom. Assign to the Operations team.
OE 25: Add audit comments to the three past-due GreenStack Fitzgerald Linear tickets using linear_create_comment. For issue_greenstack_fitzgerald_apt (issueId "issue_greenstack_fitzgerald_apt"), issue_greenstack_fitzgerald_flight (issueId "issue_greenstack_fitzgerald_flight"), and issue_greenstack_fitzgerald_movers (issueId "issue_greenstack_fitzgerald_movers"), post a comment noting that the pre-client-call audit identified data contamination between the Axiom Fitzpatrick and GreenStack Fitzgerald files, that these tickets are past due and need status review, and referencing the remediation ticket created in OE 24 for tracking.
OE 26: Send an email summary to Emeka using send_email with sender "emeka.diallo@moveops.com", recipients including "emeka.diallo@moveops.com", subject referencing the Axiom and GreenStack pre-call audit findings. Content should cover: (1) the Noah data contamination - flight ACT-77492 and apartment 412 Boylston Ave E booked under wrong client name Noah Fitzgerald (GreenStack) instead of Noah Fitzpatrick (Axiom), with specific details on what was crossed and what needs correction, (2) Axiom backend records completely missing across CRM (no deal, no engagement, company still shows Prospect), Airtable (no relocation record, Client Account still shows Cold Outreach with 0 relocations), and QuickBooks (no customer, no invoice for the $12,500 relocation), (3) Carla Mendenhall's unanswered services agreement request, (4) GreenStack invoice INV-2026-0418 for $9,440 is fully unpaid and past due as of April 25 with the $1,650 interim hazmat storage line still pending Derek Hollis's approval, (5) Mei-Lin Zhao DOT hazmat compliance documentation is verified complete per Chloe Vance's audit but Airtable relocation status still shows In Progress, (6) recommended actions before reaching out to Carla (Axiom) and Derek (GreenStack).

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

OE 1: Search emails with queries related to "Axiom Precision" or "Fitzpatrick" or "Carla Mendenhall" (or similar) using search_emails, searching both INBOX and SENT folders (folder_name parameter), to find the full Axiom intake email chain. Both Zhao and Reyes records contain the note "INVOICE DEADLINE: All invoices must be submitted by April 25 per GreenStack fiscal year-end."
OE 12: Search QuickBooks for GreenStack invoices using quickbooks_search_invoices with criteria matching DocNumber "INV-2026-0418" or customer reference related to GreenStack. Expected finding: invoice inv_greenstack_apr2026_zhao_reyes for $9,440 total, with balance $9,440 (fully unpaid), due date April 25. Line items include apartment sourcing ($1,000 x2), flight bookings ($20 x2), moving coordination ($500 x2), hazmat transport surcharge ($1,800), interim hazmat storage ($1,650 flagged as "PENDING CLIENT APPROVAL" from Derek Hollis), overweight/specialty equipment surcharge ($950), and monthly stipend fee ($2,000).
OE 13: Search QuickBooks for Axiom customers and invoices using quickbooks_search_customers with criteria related to "Axiom" and quickbooks_search_invoices. Expected finding: NO QuickBooks customer record and NO invoice exists for Axiom Precision Manufacturing. The approximately $12,500 relocation was delivered but never billed.
OE 14: Search Linear for Axiom or Fitzpatrick related issues using linear_list_issues with query "Axiom" or "Fitzpatrick" (or similar). Expected finding: only linear_issue_644c3b2e75a6 ("Rebalance April account coverage for Emeka across Sunbelt, Palmetto, Axiom, and Mosaic") referencing Axiom as one of Emeka's overloaded accounts. No dedicated Axiom relocation intake ticket found despite Fatimah's email referencing one she updated.
OE 15: Search Linear for GreenStack and Noah Fitzgerald issues using linear_list_issues with query "GreenStack" or "Fitzgerald" (or similar). Expected findings: three tickets for Noah Fitzgerald - issue_greenstack_fitzgerald_apt (#316, Apartment Search, state in_progress, due April 20 - past due), issue_greenstack_fitzgerald_flight (#317, Flight Booking PHL to SEA, state todo, due April 21 - past due), and issue_greenstack_fitzgerald_movers (#318, Moving Coordination, state todo, due April 22 - past due). All three are assigned to Fatimah Al-Rashidi. These tickets are for GreenStack's Noah but their dates and statuses need cross-referencing with what was actually done.
OE 16: Search Linear for hazmat or DOT compliance issues using linear_list_issues with query "hazmat" or "DOT" or "Zhao" (or similar). Expected finding: issue_dot_docs_zhao_greenstack ("DOT Docs - Mei-Lin Zhao / GreenStack / Class 9 Lithium", #1, state done, assigned to Chloe Vance, project DOT Compliance Audit). Documentation checklist shows all four categories verified: shipping papers, placarding certificate, carrier certification (Swift, PHMSA #3281074), and emergency response docs. The DOT compliance documentation for Mei-Lin's move is complete.
OE 17: Search emails for Mei-Lin Zhao and hazmat details using search_emails, searching both INBOX and SENT folders, with queries related to "Mei-Lin" or "Zhao" or "hazmat" or "lithium" (or similar). Expected findings: Derek Hollis's detailed relocation request describing Class 9 lithium-ion battery modules (~350 lbs, UN3481 certified, climate-controlled 15-25C), the 11-day interim storage gap (April 17-28 due to Portland lab buildout delay), Emeka's response to Derek discussing hazmat carrier coordination, Hana Kim's invoice email showing $9,440 breakdown with $1,800 hazmat surcharge and $1,650 interim storage pending client approval. Also find references to Pacific Crest Logistics as the only known DOT-compliant temp-controlled storage facility in Portland.
OE 18: Look up contact details for Derek Hollis using contacts_search_contacts with query "Derek Hollis" (or similar). Expected finding: derek.hollis@greenstackenergy.com, People Operations Manager at GreenStack Energy.
OE 19: Look up contact details for Carla Mendenhall. Search contacts_search_contacts with query "Carla Mendenhall" (or similar). Expected finding: Carla Mendenhall is NOT in the contacts system. Her email address c.mendenhall@axiomprecision.com can be found via search_emails from the Axiom email correspondence chain.
OE 20: Post a message in Slack channel C006 (#operations) using conversations_add_message, from Emeka Diallo (user_id moveops_emeka_diallo), flagging all discovered issues. Content should cover: (1) the Noah Fitzpatrick/Fitzgerald data contamination - flight ACT-77492 booked under wrong name "Noah Fitzgerald" for GreenStack instead of "Noah Fitzpatrick" for Axiom, apartment 412 Boylston sourced under wrong client, (2) missing Axiom backend records across Airtable, CRM, and QuickBooks, (3) GreenStack invoice INV-2026-0418 past due with $1,650 storage line pending approval, (4) Mei-Lin Zhao hazmat status including DOT compliance documentation verified but Airtable status still showing In Progress.
OE 21: Update the Axiom Precision Manufacturing Airtable Client Account record (recAcct000000013) using airtable_update_records on base appMoveOpsOps001, table tblClientAccts01, changing Status from "Cold Outreach" to "Active" and updating Total Relocations from 0 to 1, and updating Notes to reflect that a relocation has been completed.
OE 22: Create a CRM engagement note for Axiom Precision Manufacturing using crm_create_engagement with engagement_type "NOTE", company_ids including company_axiom, documenting the audit findings: Noah Fitzpatrick relocation completed but records missing, data contamination with GreenStack file, services agreement still not sent to Carla Mendenhall, CRM deal never created despite email self-memo.
OE 23: Create a CRM engagement note for GreenStack Energy using crm_create_engagement with engagement_type "NOTE", company_ids including company_greenstack, documenting: invoice INV-2026-0418 ($9,440) past due as of April 25, $1,650 storage line pending Derek Hollis approval, Mei-Lin Zhao hazmat DOT documentation complete, Airtable records for Zhao and Reyes still showing In Progress.
OE 24: Create a Linear ticket using linear_create_issue to track remediation of the Axiom Precision / Noah Fitzpatrick data contamination and missing records. Title should reference the Axiom records gap and Noah mix-up. Description should cover: create Airtable relocation record, create CRM deal, add Carla Mendenhall to CRM contacts, set up QuickBooks customer and invoice, send services agreement to Carla, and correct vendor records (Atlas flight and UrbanNest apartment) from GreenStack attribution to Axiom. Assign to the Operations team.
OE 25: Add audit comments to the three past-due GreenStack Fitzgerald Linear tickets using linear_create_comment. For issue_greenstack_fitzgerald_apt (issueId "issue_greenstack_fitzgerald_apt"), issue_greenstack_fitzgerald_flight (issueId "issue_greenstack_fitzgerald_flight"), and issue_greenstack_fitzgerald_movers (issueId "issue_greenstack_fitzgerald_movers"), post a comment noting that the pre-client-call audit identified data contamination between the Axiom Fitzpatrick and GreenStack Fitzgerald files, that these tickets are past due and need status review, and referencing the remediation ticket created in OE 24 for tracking.
OE 26: Send an email summary to Emeka using send_email with sender "emeka.diallo@moveops.com", recipients including "emeka.diallo@moveops.com", subject referencing the Axiom and GreenStack pre-call audit findings. Content should cover: (1) the Noah data contamination - flight ACT-77492 and apartment 412 Boylston Ave E booked under wrong client name Noah Fitzgerald (GreenStack) instead of Noah Fitzpatrick (Axiom), with specific details on what was crossed and what needs correction, (2) Axiom backend records completely missing across CRM (no deal, no engagement, company still shows Prospect), Airtable (no relocation record, Client Account still shows Cold Outreach with 0 relocations), and QuickBooks (no customer, no invoice for the $12,500 relocation), (3) Carla Mendenhall's unanswered services agreement request, (4) GreenStack invoice INV-2026-0418 for $9,440 is fully unpaid and past due as of April 25 with the $1,650 interim hazmat storage line still pending Derek Hollis's approval, (5) Mei-Lin Zhao DOT hazmat compliance documentation is verified complete per Chloe Vance's audit but Airtable relocation status still shows In Progress, (6) recommended actions before reaching out to Carla (Axiom) and Derek (GreenStack).

22 The model must search an Airtable table related to client accounts (e.g., passing a table_name containing 'Client' or 'Accounts' or similar) using airtable_search_records or airtable_list_records, in addition to searching the Relocations table.
query construction
 ✗✗✗✗✓✓ 33%
✗Run #1Although the agent's airtable_list_tables call revealed the 'Client Accounts' table (tblClientAccts01), the agent never searched or listed records from that table. All Airtable search calls used table_name='Relocations' only.
✗Run #2The agent called airtable_list_tables and discovered the 'Client Accounts' table (tblClientAccts01) exists in appMoveOpsOps001, but never queried it. All Airtable searches were against the 'Relocations' table. The Client Accounts table was never searched.
✗Run #3The agent listed Airtable tables (finding 'Relocations', 'Stipend Transactions', and 'Client Accounts') but only ever searched the Relocations table. No airtable_search_records or airtable_list_records call was made for the Client Accounts table, meaning the Axiom 'Cold Outreach' status and 0 relocations were never discovered from that source.
✗Run #4The agent called airtable_list_tables and received three tables including 'Client Accounts', but only searched the 'Relocations' table via airtable_search_records. No airtable_search_records or airtable_list_records call was made against the 'Client Accounts' table.
✓Run #5The agent explicitly searched the 'Client Accounts' table (separate from 'Relocations') using airtable_search_records with base_id appMoveOpsOps001, table_name 'Client Accounts', field_name 'Client', value 'Axiom', returning the stale Cold Outreach record.
✓Run #6The trajectory shows a separate airtable_search_records call with table_name='Client Accounts' (searching for both Axiom and GreenStack), distinct from the Relocations table searches. This confirms the agent searched both tables independently.
